import React from 'react'; const Experience = () => { const experiences = [ { company: 'Company A', role: 'Software Engineer', duration: '2022 - Present' }, { company: 'Company B', role: 'Intern', duration: '2021 - 2022' }, ]; return (

Experience

Brandcrock India Pvt. Ltd. Chennai

January 2023 - PRESENT

As a Backend Developer at Brandcrock India Pvt. Ltd. I focus on the development and enhancement of client Shopware stores, utilizing Shopware versions 5 and 6.

My responsibilities include:
  • Developing extensions for Shopware 5 and 6 to meet client needs.
  • Upgrading client shops from lower to higher versions of Shopware.
  • Migrating data from Shopware 5 to Shopware 6 for client stores.
  • Identifying and resolving critical bugs within client shops.
  • Implementing optimizations that enhanced site speed, achieving a 50% reduction in loading time.
  • Customizing plugins based on specific client requirements.

Additionally, I work on Odoo 17 development, with responsibilities that include:

  • Custom module development.
  • Website build and development.
  • Bug fixing and code optimization.
  • Customizing third-party and core modules to align with client needs.
); }; export default Experience;
